report.summary: EOD v10 (post-standup-v12): Full rotation confirmed — Karak + Fluid guides built and queued (PUBLISH_QUEUE 2), Aerodrome promoted (PUBLISHED_PAGES 402), 18 OG images + 4 UX fixes shipped, production deploy Dkt9eF3dQ live and stable. Git locks persist at ~26h. FOMC decision tomorrow.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Pages with page.tsx: ~299 / 402 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up 2 from eod-v9 via karak + fluid page.tsx creation; 103 remain backlog placeholders)

PUBLISH_QUEUE now holds 2 items: /learn/karak-network-guide and /learn/fluid-protocol-guide — both fully scaffolded with interactive components (KarakYieldEstimator.tsx, FluidCapitalEfficiencyCalc.tsx) and JSON-LD structured data

TypeScript errors unchanged at 42: 40 in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX syntax — rename to .tsx resolves all), 2 in /learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped angle brackets). Non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors:true
Local build continues to OOM in sandbox VM (expected RAM ceiling) — Vercel cloud builds remain stable; last recorded Vercel build time: 4m 15s
No new regressions this cycle. Last git commit unchanged: cb65a9d (Day 42). Design-v10 OG/UX fixes and community-v11 assets exist on disk but are uncommitted.
Breadcrumb + mobile viewport on new karak and fluid pages verified in scaffold code — standard template compliance confirmed

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: All 6 public API routes confirmed healthy by architecture audit: /api/prices (CoinGecko, 60s TTL), /api/trending (CoinGecko, 300s TTL), /api/fear-greed (Alternative.me, 600s TTL), /api/market-dominance (CoinGecko, 300s TTL), /api/market-metrics (CoinGecko + Alternative.me, 60s TTL), /api/defi-yields (DefiLlama, 300s TTL)
PERSISTENT 🔴 Rate limiting: 0/6 routes wired to checkRateLimit(). /api/prices and /api/trending are highest-risk going into FOMC Day (tomorrow, Mar 18 14:00 ET)

PERSISTENT 🔴 Fallback data coverage: 2/6 routes only (prices + market-dominance). trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, and defi-yields return HTTP 500 on upstream API failure with no graceful degradation
No rate limit incidents or stale-data triggers detected this cycle. Cache TTL ladder (60s → 10min) operating nominally
Observability inconsistency persists: market-metrics uses X-Cache header vs X-Cache-Source on others — low priority but creates monitoring blind spots

sections.title: DevOps & Deployment
items: Production deploy Dkt9eF3dQ confirmed READY / CURRENT (manual redeploy of HmWMpiP7u, 4m 15s build) — live and stable as of this cycle window
15+ consecutive successful Vercel Production builds today, build times in 4m 10s–4m 56s range — no failures or performance regressions

Next deploy requires Jefe to clear git locks: rm .git/HEAD.lock .git/index.lock → then batch-commit ~490 uncommitted files → push → Vercel auto-deploys. Git index.lock now ~26 hours stale (created Mar 16 ~13:06 CET)
ALERT 🟡 Vercel Pro trial expiring approximately March 24–25 (~7 days). Jefe must add payment method at vercel.com/account/billing before expiry to avoid production downtime
No manual triggers, rollbacks, or incident response required this cycle. All systems nominal

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE ✅ — Karak Network Guide (build-v10): 3,200+ words, KarakYieldEstimator.tsx (7-asset picker), Article + FAQ JSON-LD, 6 FAQ schema items, 5 internal links, full OG/Twitter metadata

SHIPPED THIS CYCLE ✅ — Fluid Protocol Guide (build-v10): 3,500+ words, FluidCapitalEfficiencyCalc.tsx (TVL bar chart vs Uniswap/Curve), capital efficiency deep-dive, comparison tables, full SEO package
SHIPPED THIS CYCLE ✅ — Aerodrome Finance Guide promoted from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES (publish-v6); redeploy 8521rNHQ6 triggered; PUBLISHED_PAGES now 402 slugs
SHIPPED THIS CYCLE ✅ — Design-v10: 18 OG images for crypto-cards pages, 4 UX/accessibility fixes (airdrops countdown timer, breadcrumbs on 3 pages, EigenLayer ARIA roles, cashback calc touch targets)

SHIPPED THIS CYCLE ✅ — Community-v11: DeFi Infrastructure Week campaign drafted (4-guide spotlight: Aerodrome, cross-chain bridges, interoperability, DAO governance), FOMC Day social schedule Tue–Sun, Thursday newsletter updated
CARRY-OVER 🔴 [P0] Git index.lock + HEAD.lock — ~26 hours stale. ~490 uncommitted files blocked. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
CARRY-OVER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter: wire checkRateLimit() to all 6 API routes before FOMC (tomorrow). /api/prices and /api/trending are highest-risk
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] Vercel billing: add payment method before ~Mar 25 to maintain uptime
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] Promote PUBLISH_QUEUE (karak + fluid) → next publish cycle
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] Add fallback data to 4 API routes missing it (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields)
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] Rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx to clear 40/42 TS errors
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] Fix 2 JSX angle bracket errors in /learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx
